title: phyllanthus leschenaultii
intro: Phyllanthus leschenaultii, also known as the Swietenia plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. The plant is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Phyllanthus leschenaultii include its ability to support liver health, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Phyllanthus leschenaultii is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, and can be consumed as a supplement or used topically in traditional medicine.
